entries.title: Video Timestamp Bookmark Library
entries.notes: Extracts chapters/timestamps from YouTube/Vimeo videos and builds a searchable library. Now is prime because video-first learning is dominant and creators add more chapters. No clean timestamp organizer exists that works cross-platform.
entries.pain: Manually noting video timestamps wastes time and bookmarks become unorganized

entries.title: CSS Contrast Auditor
entries.notes: Overlays contrast ratio warnings directly on page elements with one-click fixes. Built as browser extension because CSS is already rendering there. Growing accessibility lawsuit risk makes this timely.
entries.pain: Checking WCAG contrast ratios requires switching to external tools or devtools

entries.title: Webhook Provider Fingerprinter
entries.notes: Pattern-matches webhook payloads against known provider signatures (Stripe, SendGrid, Twilio, etc). Extensions see raw requests so fingerprinting is trivial. Webhook debugging is a universal pain.
entries.pain: Identifying which SaaS tool sent a webhook requires manual header inspection

entries.title: Public API Rate Limit Lookup
entries.notes: Overlays rate limit info on any API documentation page by scraping common patterns. When developers hit rate limits during integration, they lose hours. Docs are often inconsistent.
entries.pain: Finding rate limits for public APIs requires digging through docs

entries.title: Email Thread Participation Graph
entries.notes: Visualizes reply chains as a graph showing who participated most and who got dropped. Sales teams juggle many threads and lose context. Gmail extension makes this native to workflow.
entries.pain: Long email threads become confusing about who owes what action

entries.title: LinkedIn Mutual Icebreaker Finder
entries.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn profiles for shared groups, schools, employers, and highlights warm intros. SDRs need personalization at scale. Competitors require manual browsing.
entries.pain: Finding relevant mutual connections for outreach is manual and time-consuming

entries.title: PR Description Change Tracker
entries.notes: Monitors GitHub PR description edits and shows a diff over time. Code review context gets lost when descriptions change. Built with GitHub API and content scripts.
entries.pain: PR descriptions evolve but there's no history view of what changed

entries.title: Page Interaction Replay Recorder
entries.notes: Records user interactions (clicks, scrolls, inputs) as a shareable JSON sequence. QA and support teams can replay bugs exactly. Lightweight alternative to full session recording tools.
entries.pain: Recording bug reproduction steps requires screen recording or manual notes

entries.title: JSONPath Live Query Tester
entries.notes: Injects a query box on any page containing JSON, letting developers test paths in real-time. Works on API responses, localStorage, or any JSON in DOM. Faster than switching contexts.
entries.pain: Testing JSONPath queries requires copying JSON or using external playgrounds

entries.title: Conference Speaker Context Brief
entries.notes: Generates one-click briefs from speaker LinkedIn profiles and company pages before events. Sales teams lose deals by not knowing context. Events generate high-intent leads.
entries.pain: Preparing for conference meetings requires hours of manual research

entries.title: Browser Tab Energy Drain Meter
entries.notes: Estimates per-tab resource usage (CPU, memory, network) and flags heavy consumers. Laptop users want battery life; this surfaces the culprit. Works via performance observer API.
entries.pain: No visibility into which tabs drain battery or resources

entries.title: SEO Meta Tag Comparator
entries.notes: Lets users compare meta titles, descriptions, and OG tags between any two URLs side-by-side. Marketers and SEOs need quick audits. Built-in competitor analysis fills a real gap.
entries.pain: Comparing meta tags against competitors requires manual scraping

entries.title: Calendar Event Tone Analyzer
entries.notes: Analyzes the language in calendar event descriptions to flag vague meetings, missing agendas, or aggressive tone. Professionals waste hours in low-value meetings. Simple NLP on title + description.
entries.pain: Meeting invites lack clarity on urgency or desired outcomes

entries.title: LocalStorage Mutation Logger
entries.notes: Records every localStorage and sessionStorage write with timestamp, value diff, and call stack origin. Frontend devs debugging state bugs lose time finding mutations. Extension sees all storage events.
entries.pain: Tracking localStorage changes requires manual breakpoints or logging

entries.title: CSS Custom Property Dependency Map
entries.notes: Visualizes all CSS custom properties on a page and which elements use them, with a dependency graph. Design systems use hundreds of variables; understanding cascades is painful. Built with computed styles API.
entries.pain: Understanding CSS variable usage requires grep or manual inspection
